section_title: Punishment for public nuisance in cases not otherwise provided for.
chapter_title: Of Offences Affecting The Public Health, Safety, Convenience, Decency And Morals
text:
Whoever commits a public nuisance in any case not otherwise punishable by this Sanhita shall be punished with fine which may extend to one thousand rupees. 
 BNSS Classification 
 Fine of 1,000 rupees. 
 Non-cognizable 
 Bailable 
 Triable by Any Magistrate.
